changelog:
🚀 Version 1.2.1 - DiffReader

✨ New Features:
• Code Syntax Highlighting - Automatic language detection (C++, C, C#, JavaScript, Python, Java, TypeScript, HTML, CSS, XML, SQL)
• Highlights keywords (blue), strings (orange), comments (green), and numbers (green)
• Inline Changes Detection - Highlights changed segments within modified lines
• Uses LCS algorithm for accurate diff detection

🔧 Improvements:
• Enhanced visual distinction between code elements
• Better diff viewing experience for code files
• Improved parsing and rendering performance

🐛 Bug Fixes:
• Fixed copy to clipboard functionality (removes diff prefixes and headers)
• Improved Go to Line feature with better visual highlighting
• Fixed file tree navigation and selection
